allow: PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; $resp = try { Invoke-WebRequest "http://localhost:5000/api/buzz" -TimeoutSec 10 -UseBasicParsing } catch { $null }; if \($resp\) { $resp.Content | ConvertFrom-Json | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 3 } else { "Server not ready yet" })
Bash(python -c "import ast; ast.parse\(open\('newsletter.py', encoding='utf-8'\).read\(\)\); print\('Syntax OK'\)")
